## Summary

- 

## Scope

- [ ] Design-only change (logo/app name/icon/color/font/component style/layout)
- [ ] No networking/protocol/core connection logic changes (`lib/hiddifycore`, Android/iOS VPN service, gRPC/protobuf, connection control)

## Allowed Files Checklist

- [ ] `lib/core/theme/**`
- [ ] `lib/features/**/widget/**`
- [ ] `assets/images/**`
- [ ] `assets/translations/**` (app name/brand copy only)
- [ ] Store/platform metadata files only

## Validation

- [ ] Core functionality regression checked (connection/profile/settings/login/log/notification/background)
- [ ] UI verified (layout/dark mode/main locales)
- [ ] Platform build status confirmed
